_comment: Machine-readable skill routing. Agent reads at Boot B2 (grep keywords only) to match intent → load skill. on_demand_files = lookup table for G2 only — NOT auto-loaded at B3.
_schema_note: context_files renamed to on_demand_files v2.1. Each entry: { path, when, how }. 'how' values: grep_only | targeted (offset+limit) | full_ok (small files ≤30 lines only).

boot_read_policy._note: Files that MAY be read at boot — all others are on_demand only
boot_read_policy.B3_sections_only: Read SKILL.md offset=1 limit=80 — sections[] and skill name only

mece.trigger: Loop Phase 2 — runs once per task after Info Gather Loop. Builds section-based plan mapping 1:1 to target Skill sections[].
mece.skip_when: read-only task OR single file edit with backlinks=0 AND no ERR documentation needed

coder.trigger: Creating new files, scaffolding features, adding new pages or API routes

on_demand_files.when: checking file exists or backlinks before creating
assigning new T-ID (check for duplicates)
R14/R15 gate fires (DB change or destructive op)
determining correct directory for new file

editor.trigger: Modifying, debugging, or fixing existing files

on_demand_files.when: looking up symbol line number or used_in list
checking backlinks before editing a file
R14/R15 gate fires (DB change or destructive op)
checking directory structure rules
writing a new CFP entry only

file_manager.trigger: MANDATORY after any file is created, moved, deleted, or has imports changed

on_demand_files.when: updating backlinks for changed file

variable_manager.trigger: MANDATORY after any symbol is created, renamed, deleted, or its body is edited

on_demand_files.when: updating symbol entry after code change

session_manager.trigger: Token pause, blocked halt, session rotation, task completion, or user-requested close

on_demand_files.when: checking current phase at routing
resume flow or blocked state
writing SESSION_TOTAL at checkpoint

token_tracker.trigger: Boot-load only — SESSION_TOTAL read once at Boot, tracked in memory per turn, written at checkpoints

on_demand_files.when: Boot B1 read (once) and checkpoint write
reading current total for audit

self_improve.trigger: At every session close (auto-called by session_manager §3 Step 0), OR user asks to review failure patterns or improve harness

on_demand_files.when: reading CFP headers for analysis (grep -c first, then Read per entry)
proposing rule injection into CLAUDE.md
proposing rule injection into AGENTS.md

self_improve.auto_trigger: session_manager §3 Step 0 — always called before session close writes

ascii_flow.trigger: Creating or updating ASCII flow diagrams, architecture charts, flow documentation in .md files

on_demand_files.when: reading existing flow as style reference

ascii_flow.invoke_from: Any skill that creates/edits a .md file containing box diagrams must call this skill

fallback.trigger: No keyword matches any skill — use as default orchestration skill

on_demand_files.when: re-routing after failed keyword match

fallback.note: Load registry.md fast-match table, re-evaluate intent, then route manually

learned_routes._comment: Agent appends confirmed keyword→skill pairs here after repeated use
